results.prediction: Schedule Policy/Career legal challenge succeeds or fails
results.description: Federal employee unions revived their lawsuit against Schedule Policy/Career on March 5, 2026, in U.S. District Court for Maryland, seeking to block the reclassification of ~50,000 positions to at-will status. The case is pending before Judge Paula Xinis, with plaintiffs due to respond by March 13, 2026, to a government motion to dismiss. OPM's final rule took effect, enabling potential conversions as early as March 9, 2026, amid ongoing challenges in multiple courts.
